prose.en: To ensure an appropriate level of security, mobile devices that access OFFICIAL: Sensitive or PROTECTED systems or data should use mobile platforms that have completed a Common Criteria evaluation against the Protection Profile for Mobile Device Fundamentals, version 3.3 or later, and are operated in accordance with the latest version of their associated ASD security configuration guide. Furthermore, to ensure interoperability and maintain trust, mobile devices that access SECRET or TOP SECRET systems or data must use mobile platforms that have been issued an Approval for Use by ASD and are operated in accordance with the latest version of their associated Australian Communications Security Instruction.
